hermes.goal: Maximize risk-adjusted return (Sharpe) within the hard risk ceilings — capital preservation first, paper trading only.

brain.commentary: The council is uniformly flat with negative composites across the board (-0.21 to -0.37) and sub-0.40 conviction on every symbol — a weak, directionless tape. All three alts carry negative alpha versus BTC, with LTC's -0.25 alpha and SOL's -0.13 alpha plus 0.56 annualized vol standing out as fragile: they are underperforming beta expectations while carrying elevated volatility. BTC is the cleanest read (zero alpha, lowest vol at 0.39) but its composite is still mildly negative. With no counsellor input to corroborate, I defer to capital preservation: reduce gross exposure via a 0.6 global mult
